title: Decorative Red Rose Candle in Glass Votive, Floral Scented, Green Base
features: HANDCRAFTED DESIGN: Beautiful decorative candle featuring handcrafted coral-coloured tulip shapes in a clear glass holder with green base
DIMENSIONS: Compact glass holder measures approximately 7 cm in height and 6.5 cm in diameter, perfect for table settings
VERSATILE DECOR: Ideal for creating ambiance at dinner parties, special occasions, or as everyday home decoration
GLASS CONTAINER: Premium quality clear glass vessel provides elegant presentation and safe containment of the candle
REALISTIC DETAIL: Meticulously crafted wax tulips showcase lifelike petals and natural-looking coral colouration
description: Add a touch of elegant ambiance to your space with this charming decorative candle arrangement. The handcrafted coral-coloured rose-shaped candles rest beautifully in a clear glass votive holder, creating a sophisticated centrepiece perfect for any occasion. The sturdy glass container features a classic cylindrical design that showcases the delicate details of the floral candles while providing stable support. The vibrant coral hue of the rose candles contrasts wonderfully with the deep green base, making it an eye-catching decorative accent for dining tables, mantels, or special events. These artistically crafted candles bring both warmth and style to your home décor, offering a perfect blend of functionality and aesthetic appeal. The modest size makes it versatile enough to fit various settings while making a striking visual impact.
